_comment: Base Sepolia has no real Morpho / wstDIEM vault / Curve / Uniswap / Chainlink to point at, so the beta runs against MOCK external protocols. Deploy them with `forge script script/v2/DeployMocks.s.sol:DeployMocks` (see that file's header). The mock/core addresses below are FILLED FROM the DeployMocks console output at deploy time. Do NOT run the canonical `Deploy.s.sol` against this file — DeployMocks bootstraps its own mock venues and fingerprints. Placeholder 0x2000.../0x3000... values are kept only as valid-shaped defaults and MUST be overwritten with the DeployMocks output before the addresses are relied upon.

markets._comment: market.id is the Morpho market id = keccak256(abi.encode(loanToken, collateralToken, oracle, irm, lltv)); DeployMocks derives and logs it.
